case_title: EMPRESS, L.L.C. VS. JAMES A. TROTTER et al

docket_entries.description: ANSWER FILED BY DEFENDANT ABDULLAH AKA JAMES A. TRO, KHALIL M ABDULLAH, KHALIL M. AKA JAMES A. TROTTER

JUDGE DONNA HITCHENS, CLERK RANI EDWARDS, REPORTER PATTY VAN STEENBERGE. MASTER COURT CALENDAR OF JAN-12-2004 ASSIGNED TO COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON JAN-12-2004 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 514, THOMAS J. MELLON, JR..

THE COURT ORDERS A RECESS IN ORDER TO ALLOW THE PARTIES TO DISCUSS A POSSIBLE SETTLEMENT. THE CASE IS SETTLED. STIPULATED JUDGMENT SIGNED, FILED, ENTERED AND SCANNED THIS DATE.

COURT TRIAL

MINI MINUTES: Department 514. Judge: Thomas J. Mellon, Jr.; Clerk: Dan MacDuff; Reporter: Mary J. Hinds. APPEARANCES: plaintiff by Vijay Patel, with counsel, Arnold W. Evje, II; defendant in pro per.
